overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from GTA V showing a character running through a rainy, foggy urban Los Santos environment. The character navigates wet sidewalks, crosses multi-lane streets, and runs through grassy medians alongside moderate traffic during a heavy storm.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban sidewalk alongside elevated highway with concrete barrier

events.description: silver sedan drives past on the wet road to the right

agents.ego_description: running steadily along the rain-soaked sidewalk next to a busy multi-lane road

notable_agents.action: dark-colored sedan driving along the wet asphalt road

entered.detail: tall curved modern office building with horizontal window bands and red signage near the base
high concrete sound barrier wall separating the sidewalk from the lower highway
tall metal pole with horizontal traffic signal arms
tall palm trees lining the opposite side of the street

segments.scene_description: The character runs along a wet concrete sidewalk next to a busy highway during a heavy rainstorm. A massive curved glass office tower dominates the left side while palm trees and traffic lights line the right. Vehicles pass by on the rain-slicked road as the character approaches an intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: grassy median with mature trees between opposing traffic lanes

events.description: character crosses the wet asphalt street and turns left onto a grassy path
transition from concrete sidewalk to grassy median with mature oak trees

agents.ego_description: crossing the street and turning left to run through a grassy median with trees

notable_agents.action: silver SUV driving past on the road adjacent to the grassy area

entered.detail: green highway sign with white text reading 'Freeway Entrance' and a blue Route 2 shield
large leafy deciduous trees in the grassy median with dense canopies

segments.scene_description: The character crosses the street and turns left into a grassy median filled with mature oak trees. A green freeway entrance sign appears on the left as the character runs through the grass alongside the road. The curved office tower is now visible across the street on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: tree-lined grassy strip alongside urban roadway

events.description: exits the grassy median and returns to concrete sidewalk

agents.ego_description: running through the grassy area and between trees alongside the busy road

entered.detail: tall buildings visible through the heavy fog in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character continues running through the tree-lined grassy median with the curved office tower visible in the distance. The scene transitions back to concrete sidewalk as the character approaches another intersection, with distant skyscrapers barely visible through the fog.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with crosswalk and office building frontage

events.description: character crosses the intersection while vehicles wait at the red traffic light
vintage black muscle car drives through the intersection from right to left

agents.ego_description: crossing the wet intersection and continuing along the sidewalk next to office buildings

notable_agents.action: vintage black sedan with white wall tires driving through the intersection

entered.detail: traffic signals and crosswalk markings at the urban intersection
low-rise white office building with multiple windows and flat roof

segments.scene_description: The character crosses a busy urban intersection with traffic lights and crosswalk markings, passing waiting vehicles. A vintage muscle car drives through the intersection as the character reaches the opposite side. The curved glass office tower now looms large on the left while a white office building appears on the right.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rain-drenched urban corridor that shifts from a highway-side sidewalk into a lush median before returning to a dense city intersection. It begins with the character running along a wet concrete sidewalk beside a busy highway, dominated by a massive curved glass office tower and rain-slicked roads. As the character crosses the street, the environment transitions into a grassy median filled with mature oak trees and freeway signage, with the glass tower receding into the background. The scene then shifts back to the concrete sidewalk as the character exits the greenery, moving through a thick fog that partially obscures distant skyscrapers. Finally, the camera follows the character across a busy urban intersection past waiting vehicles and a vintage muscle car, ending as the curved glass tower looms large on the left beside a white office building.
